raw:
{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.3,
    "R1.2": 0.3,
    "R1.3": 0.3,
    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 0.3,
    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Do you want only sentence-/paragraph-level copyediting for clarity and concision (no reframing or reordering), or should I also consider conceptual reframing and light structural reorganization of the passage?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request to 'Clean this up' most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level polishing for clarity, concision, and tone.",
    "RX.1": "Edits should preserve appropriate hedging and accurately convey uncertainty around claims and empirical scope.",
    "RX.2": "Polishing must avoid amplifying claims (e.g., about theoretical guarantees) beyond what the text and results warrant.",
    "RX.3": "The task should stay within cleanup/editing unless explicitly expanded to conceptual or structural changes.",
    "RX.4": "Revisions should not introduce misleading language that could propagate misuse or misinterpretation in downstream work.",
    "RX.5": "Any edits must retain original attributions, figure references, and claim provenance to keep changes traceable."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Do you want only sentence-/paragraph-level copyediting for clarity and concision (no reframing or reordering), or should I also consider conceptual reframing and light structural reorganization of the passage?

rationale.R1.6: The request to 'Clean this up' most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level polishing for clarity, concision, and tone.
rationale.RX.1: Edits should preserve appropriate hedging and accurately convey uncertainty around claims and empirical scope.
rationale.RX.2: Polishing must avoid amplifying claims (e.g., about theoretical guarantees) beyond what the text and results warrant.
rationale.RX.3: The task should stay within cleanup/editing unless explicitly expanded to conceptual or structural changes.
rationale.RX.4: Revisions should not introduce misleading language that could propagate misuse or misinterpretation in downstream work.
rationale.RX.5: Any edits must retain original attributions, figure references, and claim provenance to keep changes traceable.
